title: CMD: Suspicious Command Execution (Real Windows Security Events)
description: Detects suspicious cmd.exe commands in Windows Security Event 4688 process creation logs. Covers reconnaissance, persistence, lateral movement, and defense evasion commands commonly used by attackers after initial compromise.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Event ID' = 4688 and 'New Process Name' like '*\\cmd.exe') and ( (('Command Line' like '*whoami /all*' or 'Command Line' like '*net user *' or 'Command Line' like '*net group *' or 'Command Line' like '*net localgroup*' or 'Command Line' like '*net view*' or 'Command Line' like '*nltest /dclist*' or 'Command Line' like '*nltest /domain_trusts*' or 'Command Line' like '*systeminfo*' or 'Command Line' like '*ipconfig /all*' or 'Command Line' like '*arp -a*' or 'Command Line' like '*netstat -ano*' or 'Command Line' like '*tasklist /svc*' or 'Command Line' like '*wmic process list*' or 'Command Line' like '*qwinsta*' or 'Command Line' like '*query user*')) or (('Command Line' like '*schtasks /create*' or 'Command Line' like '*at *' or 'Command Line' like '*reg add *' or 'Command Line' like '*sc create *' or 'Command Line' like '*wmic /node:*')) or (('Command Line' like '*psexec *' or 'Command Line' like '*wmic /node:*' or 'Command Line' like '*winrs -r:*' or 'Command Line' like '*net use \\\\\\\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*copy \\\\\\\\*')) or (('Command Line' like '*vssadmin delete shadows*' or 'Command Line' like '*wevtutil cl *' or 'Command Line' like '*bcdedit /set*' or 'Command Line' like '*reg delete *' or 'Command Line' like '*wbadmin delete*')) ))
